scripts.push: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const v=p.version.split('.');v[1]=parseInt(v[1])+1;v[2]=0;p.version=v.join('.');fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Version bumped to '+p.version)" && git add package.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git push origin main
